# BrierStudios
> Dark fantasy creative studio — dark fantasy aesthetics forged in Norse mythology and iron.

## What is BrierStudios?
BrierStudios is a creative technology studio founded by Ainz (BrierAinz). We build tools, agents, and art inspired by the Yggdrasil framework — a Norse mythology-inspired architecture that organizes projects into Nine Realms. Our visual language: dark fantasy, medieval aesthetics, Elder Futhark runes, and forge-iron textures.

## Flagship: Lilith v5.1 — Dark Fantasy Nordic
Lilith is our dark fantasy goddess — horns of ancient bronze and eyes of honey-gold (#c8a23e), with a forge-iron crown inscribed with Elder Futhark runes. She represents the studio's visual language across all products. Version 2.0 pivoted from cyberpunk neon to dark fantasy nordic; current 5.x line adds Helheim, Midgard, and Svartalfheim realm variants.

### Core Palette (Dark Fantasy Nordic)
- Gold: #c8a23e (primary accent — Lilith's eyes)
- Bronze: #d19a66 (secondary accent — forge iron)
- Deep Dark: #1a1b26 (base background)
- Pale: #e2e8f0 (text)
- Void: #060810 (deepest dark)
- Hel: #c026d3 (danger/error)
- Asgard Gold, Vanaheim Rose, Alfheim Sky, Helheim Crimson (realm-specific accents)

### Fonts
- Cinzel (serif headings — medieval character)
- Inter (body text — clean readability)
- JetBrains Mono (code — forge lattice)
- MedievalSharp (runic icons — Elder Futhark)

### The Nine Realms
|| Realm | Rune | Domain | Purpose ||
|-------|------|--------|------------|
|| Asgard | ᚦ | Core Technology | Foundation libraries, configs, scaffolding |
|| Vanaheim | ᛒ | AI Agents | Discord bots, Telegram agents, personality systems |
|| Alfheim | ᛇ | UI Prototypes | Visual design systems, frontend experiments |
|| Svartalfheim | ᛉ | Knowledge & Docs | Documentation, wikis, knowledge bases |
|| Muspelheim | ᛝ | Active Dev | Work-in-progress, experimental branches |
|| Niflheim | ᛁ | Resources & Assets | Static assets, models, datasets |
|| Helheim | ᚹ | Archive | Deprecated code, graveyard of failed experiments |
|| Jotunheim | ᛃ | Massive Projects | Large-scale, long-term undertakings |
|| Midgard | ᛗ | Personal Apps | End-user applications, utilities |

## Products

### Yggdrasil CLI v2.5
A command-line interface with slash commands for managing projects across the Nine Realms. Features include project scaffolding, realm switching, agent management, deployment pipelines, and a command palette with dark fantasy themed UI.

Key commands: /init, /status, /build, /test, /lint, /realms, /agent, /deploy, /theme, /runes

### BrierStudios Landing Site v4.1
Live at brierstudios.com — a dark fantasy nordic themed landing page showcasing the studio's identity, Lilith variants, project portfolio, and animated CLI demo. Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, deployed on Cloudflare Pages. Features runic particles, forge-iron textures, Cinzel typography, Elder Futhark icon system, and Cloudflare Turnstile-protected contact form.

### Lilith Landing Page v2.6
Live at brierstudios.com/lilith — a dedicated character dossier for Lilith with identity section, gallery, Nine Realms mapping, core traits, and LoRA/art documentation. Includes 9 realm variants (Asgard, Vanaheim, Alfheim, Svartalfheim, Muspelheim, Niflheim, Helheim, Jotunheim, Midgard).

### docs.brierstudios.com
Full documentation site built with Docusaurus v3. Covers CLI reference, Lilith identity, architecture, AI agents, and LoRA training pipelines.

### Yggdrasil MCP Server
FastMCP server exposing tools (ecosystem_health, list_comfyui_models, list_recent_outputs, generate_image, list_comfyui_nodes, get_lora_info) + resources. Built with pydantic-ai integration for Lilith orchestrator.

### Lilith Swarm v5
Multi-agent orchestration system with Coordinator pattern, TaskPlanner, ConflictResolver, OutputValidator, FallbackChain, and ComplexityRouter. Agents: Eva, Adán, Odín, Shalltear, Planner.

### LoRA Training Pipeline
Character model training using PixAI DiT.2 (Tsubaki.2). Active LoRAs: KNQ_V1, RGTA_V1. Captions use 30+ char natural language visual descriptions (not Danbooru tags).

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, Docusaurus v3 (docs)
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages + Cloudflare Workers
- Domain: brierstudios.com (Cloudflare registrar)
- AI: Custom LoRAs on PixAI DiT.2 (Tsubaki.2), ComfyUI workflows
- CLI: Node.js / Ink (React for CLI)
- Backend: Python (pydantic-ai, FastMCP, LangGraph), Cloudflare Workers (JS)
- Agent Framework: Lilith Swarm v5 (coordinator pattern)
- Security: Cloudflare Turnstile, honeypot fields, KV-backed rate limiting
- Style: Cinzel (headings) + Inter (body) + JetBrains Mono (code) + MedievalSharp (runic)

## The Yggdrasil Rules (REGLAS_YGGDRASIL.md)
All projects follow a unified convention system defined in REGLAS_YGGDRASIL.md. This includes naming conventions, color palette, Elder Futhark rune markers per realm, and architectural patterns.
